linkedin.text: Whitewashed walls. Aegean blue. A sunset that turns a corporate dinner into a memory people talk about for years. 🌅 Mykonos isn't just a backdrop — it's a statement that your team has arrived. We've staged gala nights for hundreds on its seaside terraces, with logistics handled end-to-end so you only see the magic. This is where incentive trips stop feeling like work trips. Thinking Greece for your next reward program? image_prompt: Aerial twilight view of Mykonos coastline, whitewashed cube houses cascading down to a dark Aegean sea, iconic windmills silhouetted on a ridge, a distant cluster of hundreds of event guests gathered on a vast seaside terrace lit by warm lanterns, tiny figures from above, deep indigo sky with first stars. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, no CGI, no text, no logos.
